# Pitch CRM

> AI-powered construction and roofing CRM with power dialer, AI roof measurements, estimates, proposals, territory canvassing, and pipeline management.

Pitch CRM replaces tools like AccuLynx, JobNimbus, CompanyCam, EagleView, Mojo Dialer, Roofr, and DocuSign in a single platform built for residential roofing, general construction, home improvement, and solar contractors.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview and intro to Pitch CRM.
- [Features](/features): Power dialer, AI measurements, estimates, proposals, territory mapping, automation, and analytics.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans for CRM, Live Canvass, and AI Measuring tiers.
- [Request a demo](/demo-request): Book a guided walkthrough with the team.
- [Login](/login): Customer sign-in.

## Optional

- [Privacy](/legal/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Terms](/legal/terms): Terms of service.
- [Security](/legal/security): Security practices.
